title: rubus × complicatus
intro: Rubus × complicatus, also known as Japanese raspberry or thimbleberry, is a hybrid plant species within the Rosaceae family, combining characteristics of both the Rubus and Rubus fruticosus species. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × complicatus include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, among others. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
